Executive_Question: What must be decided, why does it matter, and by when?
Who approves, what is unacceptable, and what must remain private?
What are the buyer, offer, price, target, capacity, and assumptions?
What is supported, missing, disputed, blocked, or out of scope?
What is the minimum proof work and who validates it?
Which sources, tests, contradictions, risks, and replay paths are visible?
What changed, what remains blocked, and what happens next?
